task_description: Fix premium calculator: correct calcPremi formula (remove *1.12 multiplier), add Rawat Jalan and Rawat Gigi benefit options with data extracted from Excel source files, make Rawat Gigi only available for Syariah, and fix download links to brosur PDFs.

verification.summary: All verification tests pass: calcPremi no longer multiplies by 1.12, DATA_SYARIAH PRIA 45 Topaz ID = 15576400 displays correctly, DATA_KONV_RJ/DATA_SYARIAH_RJ/DATA_SYARIAH_GIGI all present with correct Excel-derived values, benefit type selector added with Rawat Gigi only for Syariah, download links updated, footer corrected.
